---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
data(iris)
t.test(iris$Sepal.Length, mu = 30)
```

```{r}
t.test(iris$Sepal.Length[iris$Species =="setosa"], iris$Sepal.Length[iris$Species =="versicolor"], alternative = "less")

# sepal length of setosa is more than versicolor, when greater alternative
```

```{r}
library(car)
leveneTest(iris$Sepal.Length ~ iris$Species)

levels(iris$Species)
```

```{r}
anova <- aov(iris$Sepal.Length ~ iris$Species)
```

```{r}
summary(anova)
```

iris sepal length for all is equal is null hyp
is different is alt hyp
